scripts.build: nuxt generate && mkdir -p dist/server dist/.openai && cp sites/server/index.js dist/server/index.js && cp .openai/hosting.json dist/.openai/hosting.json
scripts.dev: if grep -qi microsoft /proc/version 2>/dev/null; then nuxt dev --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000; else TMPDIR=/tmp PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH nuxt dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 3000; fi
